name: Team Morse
subject: reality check
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4Z5UAO0aPcttFotHQYgPAF5q5i5Hq9lM4gUsE1b1HVg=/3dNEDgWo62MxsTI0kamWGoUS8xHEpFga_MUtsA0mvyA=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_201801015_TM_20181015-postdebate_all_logo)
We wanted to shoot you this quick note, Peter--Jessica just left the stage after her first televised joint interview with Tom McClintock.
This evening, with thousands of voters watching, McClintock made it even more clear why we need and deserve new leadership for our district--leadership that listens to facts and reason.
Whether it was bragging about his "scientific" approach to fire prevention (despite clearcutting being proven to increase chances of an out-of-control fire) and then doing a 180 to cast doubts on the scientific reality of climate change, McClintock showed that he is completely out of touch with the realities facing our district, state, nation--and planet.
**Tonight, we reached thousands of voters who could be making their decisions and mailing their ballots back, starting NOW** --making it even more urgent that those voters hear from us about why we need Jessica in Congress and why we can't afford another term of McClintock. We can tip the scales, but only if we have the resources to act now.
**From now until November 6th, we need all hands on deck to talk to voters. Chip in now to help us do it:**
[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4Z5UAO0aPcttFotHQYgPAF5q5i5Hq9lM4gUsE1b1HVg=/uawhetQw9aOCezHeOlQatsa6QiW-v4uS2NbpK3GMFNM=?recurring=auto&amount=15&refcode=email_ngp_fr_201801015_TM_20181015-postdebate_all_15) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4Z5UAO0aPcttFotHQYgPAF5q5i5Hq9lM4gUsE1b1HVg=/uawhetQw9aOCezHeOlQatsa6QiW-v4uS2NbpK3GMFNM=?recurring=auto&amount=25&refcode=email_ngp_fr_201801015_TM_20181015-postdebate_all_25)

name: staff@martinheinrich.com
subject: There's no other way to say it:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | There's no other way to say it: We CANNOT miss our final FEC goal before the election.

**_[Read more below to find out why, or click here to donate now and help us stand strong against Gary Johnson and the national Libertarian super PAC funneling millions to support him->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Read+more+below+to+find+out+why+or+click&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3")_**

_Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:_

This is it -- on Wednesday, I face my final Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline of my Senate reelection campaign.

**This is the final reporting deadline before the election, and my first head-to-head report against Libertarian Gary Johnson since super PACs dropped $2 million to support him.** Read more below on why this is a make-or-break moment for the rest of my campaign. Or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our final FEC fundraising deadline goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Help+me+reach+our+final+FEC+fundraising+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3")_**

* * *

Earlier this month, my Senate race was flipped on its head when a national Libertarian super PAC announced it was spending millions to support Gary Johnson.

Since then, I've been amazed by the outpouring of support as we fight back against dark-money groups and share my vision for New Mexico. Now, we're facing one of our final tests before Election Day.

**Wednesday is the final FEC deadline before the election, and****afterwards****I will have to report my fundraising numbers for the last time before Election Day. With Johnson giving six-figures to his own campaign, we can 't afford a weak showing in the final weeks of this race.**
[DONATE $29 NOW >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3") I already had a target on my back before Johnson entered the race. I've worked hard in the Senate to protect health care, public lands, and workers' rights -- which is why the Koch brothers launched ads against me earlier this year.

**Simply put: the stakes have never been higher for me, and this is our final chance before Election Day to make an impression.** That's why my team and I are focusing on more grassroots organizing and expanding our ad spending to reach as many voters as possible once early voting starts this Saturday.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To expand our campaign before early voting begins, our new budget goal is to raise an additional $75,000 before our Wednesday deadline. This is my first Senate reelection race, and all our hard work and more will be undone if Gary Johnson or Mick Rich defeats me in November. Will you pitch in now and help us close our budget gap before we publically report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3")** Thank you for your support,

Martin

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---
**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b41b/43d8135f/663beea0/5101b347/197413657/VEsP/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3")**

Make sure to follow the campaign on **[Twitter](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b41b/43d8135f/663beea0/5101b346/197413657/VEsHBQ/ "https://twitter.com/teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3")** and **[Facebook.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b41b/43d8135f/663beea0/5101b349/197413657/VEsHBA/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3")**

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b41b/43d8135f/663beea0/5101b348/197413657/VEsHBw/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b41b/43d8135f/663beea0/5101b34b/197413657/VEsHBg/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181015_2_3").

Martin Heinrich for Senate
PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Caroline Hall
subject: 2 days, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This is the final stretch. Since Roy announced Break the Majority last July, we've been building up to this moment.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203966/2fde7c66/49a51422/15687655/695787260/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ctdeadline2?refcode=20181012_BTM_deadline4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friend,

Since Roy announced Break the Majority last July, we've been building up to this moment.

Over the last sixteen months, we have invested in our grassroots organization and focused on making sure we're able to get our people out to vote in this election.

Now, as we enter the final stretch, it's time to finish the job.

**Last week, I ran the numbers and it became clear we needed another $50,000 before our deadline this Wednesday to stay on budget. We're only about halfway there -- can you chip in before the deadline?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203966/2fde7c66/49a51422/15687654/695787260/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ctdeadline2?refcode=20181012_btm_deadline4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
[Chip in $50 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203966/2fde7c66/49a51422/15687657/695787260/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck1pQjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ctdeadline2?refcode=20181012_btm_deadline4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
[Chip in $100 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203966/2fde7c66/49a51422/15687656/695787260/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiMTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ctdeadline2?refcode=20181012_btm_deadline4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
[Chip in another amount ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203966/2fde7c66/49a51422/15687669/695787260/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ctdeadline2?refcode=20181012_btm_deadline4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop")
---

As Roy has been saying, this election is about protecting future generations. It's about getting a General Assembly that will help Roy raise teacher pay to at least the national average.

Breaking the majority is crucial to making sure Roy can continue to make progress for North Carolinians.

[**We can't afford to fall short, Friend. Chip in before the deadline if you can.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203966/2fde7c66/49a51422/15687668/695787260/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ctdeadline2?refcode=20181012_btm_deadline4")

Thanks for your support,
Caroline Hall
NC Finance Director

* * *

name: Gabe Amo
subject: A clear victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
|
---
[ ](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a03f/5e076a9e/54cd2e01/14425175/2545652768/VEsH/ "http://ginaraimondo.com")

| | Hey friend, **I hope you tuned into the debate earlier tonight -- the contrast between the candidates couldn 't have been starker.** Governor Gina Raimondo made a clear case that she's bringing the change Rhode Island needs, while Mayor Allan Fung and former Representative Joe Trillo made clear that they'll just bring us backwards. **Gina is bringing the change we need.** Her focus on job creation and education at every level have helped Rhode Islanders keep up and get ahead, and she's just getting started. Building on her record investments in education at every level and successful job training programs, Gina is going to create a Universal Job Training program in her second term. She's going to expand the wildly successful Promise Scholarship, and create a Universal Pre-K program. **But Fung and Trillo made one thing clear on the stage tonight: they oppose nearly every policy that Gina has passed.** If elected, they would turn back the clock on Rhode Island's progress, threatening to take us back to the days when we had the highest unemployment in the nation, and leaving our roads and bridges to rot. **The stakes are high in this election. You can make a difference.[Click here to donate $22 or as much as you can right now! ](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a03f/5e076a9e/54cd2e01/14425174/2545652768/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=181015")** Thank you, Gabe Gabe Amo
Senior Advisor
---
|
---

Friends of Gina Raimondo
PO Box 40794
Providence, RI 02940

This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.

Building on her record investments in education at every level and successful job training programs, Gina is going to create a Universal Job Training program in her second term. She's going to expand the wildly successful Promise Scholarship, and create a Universal Pre-K program. But Fung and Trillo made one thing clear on the stage tonight: they oppose nearly every policy that Gina has passed. If elected, they would turn back the clock on Rhode Island's progress, threatening to take us back to the days when we had the highest unemployment in the nation, and leaving our roads and bridges to rot. The stakes are high in this election. You can make a difference. "" Thank you, Gabe Gabe Amo Senior Advisor | "" "" "" Friends of Gina Raimondo PO Box 40794 Providence, RI 02940 This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.

name: Jake Fons
subject: closed the gap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
With the race this close...

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181015PM_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, We're less than 72 hours away from our final FEC deadline and we just got a poll showing our opponent closing the gap to within three points. And with super PACs on the air against us as we speak, we could see this race get even tighter. name: Stacey Abrams
subject: How you can help (Hurricane Michael)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
In the aftermath of Hurricane Michael, Team Abrams has been working hard to make sure we are serving as many Georgians as possible. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8cd/34a064cc/eaef902/70d2325/981016847/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend - Last week, Hurricane Michael swept across the Florida panhandle, parts of Alabama, and South Georgia. Thousands of our neighbors are still struggling through the long, arduous recovery process. In the aftermath of this disaster, #TeamAbrams has been working hard to make sure we are serving as many Georgians as possible. We understand that the devastation doesn't end when the cameras turn off and the news crews disappear. And our Voter Protection Team is busy making sure Georgians still know when and where they can cast their vote early. If you live in Georgia and are concerned about whether you will be able to vote, please call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816. No one should lose their right to vote because of this storm. This isn't just a moment of loss. This kind of destruction can have long-term effects, especially if we don't support these communities now to help them rebuild. **[That's why we're working to offer support and assistance to those in need. Will you join us? Make a donation today to help those in affected areas.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8cd/34a064cc/eaef902/70d2322/981016847/VEsE/ "https://www.globalgiving.org/projects/hurricane-michael-relief-fund/")** No natural disaster is stronger than the strength of our community when we come together. Thank you and stay safe, Stacey
---

|
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8cd/34a064cc/eaef902/70d2323/981016847/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/stacey.abrams.77/") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8cd/34a064cc/eaef902/70d2320/981016847/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/staceyabrams") [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8cd/34a064cc/eaef902/70d2321/981016847/VEsD/ "https://www.instagram.com/staceyabrams/")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Linda_S=C3=A1nchez?=
subject: If we want to make progress, we have to beat Dana Rohrabacher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Democratic challenger Harley Rouda is now tied with Rohrabacher, and grassroots support will be what puts him over the top. Peter,

Everything we are fighting for each day -- making healthcare more affordable, making it easier for workers to organize, and passing comprehensive immigration reform -- depends on Democrats taking back the House this November. **And our path to the House majority runs through districts like CA-48, which is held by Republican Dana Rohrabacher.**

[**Democratic challenger Harley Rouda is now tied with Rohrabacher, and grassroots support will be what puts him over the top. Please chip in to help him raise $1,008 more before midnight!**](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181015_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

We recently learned that a top GOP donor has committed $10 million to help salvage at-risk seats like CA-48.

The Republicans think they can buy their way out of a crushing defeat. I'm ready to show them otherwise. Are you with me?

**Please make a secure contribution for Harley Rouda here before midnight:[http://ca.voteforlinda.com/rouda](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181015_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Let's do this!

Linda

**\---- ORIGINAL MESSAGE ----**
> **New Poll of CA-48:** **Rouda (D) 48%**
> **Rohrabacher (R) 48%**
>
> **[Donate to help us defeat Dana Rohrabacher and flip a critical seat from red to blue>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181015_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
> * * *
> Peter,
>
> The road to taking back the House on November 6 runs right through California's 48th District. The district was carried by Hillary Clinton, but it's represented by Republican Dana Rohrabacher. Rohrabacher was caught on camera this summer saying that children as young as four should be taught how to use firearms, and he's rubber-stamped every bit of the Trump agenda.
>
> **A new poll from UC Berkeley now has Rohrabacher TIED with his Democratic challenger, Harley Rouda.**
>
> This race is too close to call, and we cannot take anything for granted. Conservative dark money groups are spending millions of dollars in districts like this. We need to make sure Harley Rouda can fight back for every one of the last 23 days of this election.
>
> **Linda 's lending her hand to help Rouda -- and she needs your help too!** We're aiming to raise an emergency $2,300 for Rouda from our grassroots team by tomorrow. **[Please rush a secure contribution so Rouda can defeat Rohrabacher!](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181015_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Harley Rouda and Linda S anchez:_ | | ******[Chip in $10 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668f/4ac3d62d/6a1d9330/1ce29271/1172214110/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=RTW_181015_Rouda_EM")******
> ---
> ******[Chip in $25 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668f/4ac3d62d/6a1d9330/1ce29276/1172214110/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=RTW_181015_Rouda_EM")******
> ******[Chip in $50 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668f/4ac3d62d/6a1d9330/1ce29277/1172214110/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=RTW_181015_Rouda_EM")******
> ******[Chip in $100 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668f/4ac3d62d/6a1d9330/1ce29274/1172214110/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=RTW_181015_Rouda_EM")******
> ******[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/1503668f/4ac3d62d/6a1d9330/1ce29275/1172214110/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=RTW_181015_Rouda_EM")******
> ******[Or donate another amount>>](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180719_ls_rouda?refcode=RTW_181015_Rouda_EM&recurring=auto&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
> Linda was proud to support Harley Rouda before the primary, and she's going to do all she can to help him get to Congress. She knows that Rouda will put education, good-paying jobs, and affordable healthcare first, and won't ever back down from defending our democratic values.

And our path to the House majority runs through districts like CA-48, which is held by Republican Dana Rohrabacher. Friends: Senate control _hinges_ on our race here in Nevada, but right now, _we're losing ground. _A recent poll shows us **down by 1 point** to GOP extremist Sen. Dean Heller**.**__ Here's what you need to know:
* **Donald Trump just came to Nevada again** to fundraise for Heller, hosting a _$25,000-per-person_ event full of GOP mega-donors.
* **We're being outspent by the GOP** : Mitch McConnell is desperate to keep his grip on Senate control, so he's spending $22 MILLION to defeat us.
* With just 22 days until Nevadans head to the polls, **we have to raise $50,000 before our FINAL FEC deadline** to take back the Senate for Democrats - and we're falling short.

That's why this is such huge news: **A group of generous donors just offered to MATCH ALL GIFTS to help us hit this goal and take back the Senate!

This is the final FEC deadline before Election Day, and we can't win if we miss this goal - so I'm counting on you to give immediately to win in Nevada so we can take back the Senate:**

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Before the next storm
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/TczMEl6Pw2VwcT4iLwZCwWEsinH_4_t7eCZh4d7QSwI=/vKfs9RZa_1v3ZmGjCYK8cQf45NS0jOch5khDDZa5SN8=) Friends and Neighbors -- Climate change is one of the most pressing issues our state faces - and never more so than in the aftermath of a monster storm like Hurricane Michael.

Our governor and state leadership may not believe in talking or even thinking about the effects of climate change - but as **[a recent piece in _Politico_](https://act.myngp.com/el/TczMEl6Pw2VwcT4iLwZCwWEsinH_4_t7eCZh4d7QSwI=/_MHx3Pg7E3NpajzQ2NQgpSKrNWrEpL0rgacyjMam3w4=) _ _** pointed out, **insurers sure do.**_ _

As the article highlights, insurance rates were already on an upward track before Michael. After more than a decade of no hurricanes in Florida, the damages from Hermine and Matthew in 2016, Irma in 2017 and now Michael in 2018 are all high risk factors for Florida insurers. **And more risk equals higher deductibles and premiums for customers.**

Former Governor Crist expanded state run storm insurance - but Governor Scott later scaled it back, leaving Florida consumers as sitting ducks for each major weather event that followed.

**And so far, the Legislature has done nothing about it. But that 's where the office of the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) can come in, to act as a check and a balance.**
[Help our neighbors rebuild](https://act.myngp.com/el/TczMEl6Pw2VwcT4iLwZCwWEsinH_4_t7eCZh4d7QSwI=/FXEcSIps5FyJxNko5mL1WXv3oTwRZhzlOgl1_nCyUn0=?cid=fy19hurmichael&med=cpc&source=google&scode=rsg00000e017&gclid=Cj0KCQjw6fvdBRCbARIsABGZ-vQtLM_osmeiU-iZPJRuArskhGsbSeW_9EqMuUw835mnkr6sey4HyuoaAoj5EALw_wcB&gclsrc=aw.ds&dclid=CIGg0Yit_90CFQnPZAodU24FhA) As your next CFO, I will help make sure Florida is prepared for another hurricane or whatever Mother Nature - and climate change has in store for us, before the next storm. And your next CFO, I will do everything in my power to protect consumers and make sure that insurance companies fulfill their promises to their policy holders. **One of the most important elections yet is in exactly three weeks. But our neighbors need our help right now. ** [**Can you make a donation to the Red Cross today, to help the post storm rebuilding efforts?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/TczMEl6Pw2VwcT4iLwZCwWEsinH_4_t7eCZh4d7QSwI=/FXEcSIps5FyJxNko5mL1WXv3oTwRZhzlOgl1_nCyUn0=?cid=fy19hurmichael&med=cpc&source=google&scode=rsg00000e017&gclid=Cj0KCQjw6fvdBRCbARIsABGZ-vQtLM_osmeiU-iZPJRuArskhGsbSeW_9EqMuUw835mnkr6sey4HyuoaAoj5EALw_wcB&gclsrc=aw.ds&dclid=CIGg0Yit_90CFQnPZAodU24FhA) Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/TczMEl6Pw2VwcT4iLwZCwWEsinH_4_t7eCZh4d7QSwI=/_h0CRtqmNsKRMnKg5LzTyIu1uSAAAMSRzDHgeb7gzo8=).

clean_body: | = Friends and Neighbors -- Climate change is one of the most pressing issues our state faces - and never more so than in the aftermath of a monster storm like Hurricane Michael. Our governor and state leadership may not believe in talking or even thinking about the effects of climate change - but as = pointed out, insurers sure do. As the article highlights, insurance rates were already on an upward track before Michael. After more than a decade of no hurricanes in Florida, the damages from Hermine and Matthew in 2016, Irma in 2017 and now Michael in 2018 are all high risk factors for Florida insurers. And more risk equals higher deductibles and premiums for customers. Former Governor Crist expanded state run storm insurance - but Governor Scott later scaled it back, leaving Florida consumers as sitting ducks for each major weather event that followed. And so far, the Legislature has done nothing about it. But that 's where the office of the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) can come in, to act as a check and a balance. As your next CFO, I will help make sure Florida is prepared for another hurricane or whatever Mother Nature - and climate change has in store for us, before the next storm. And your next CFO, I will do everything in my power to protect consumers and make sure that insurance companies fulfill their promises to their policy holders. One of the most important elections yet is in exactly three weeks. But our neighbors need our help right now. Thank you for everything you do, Jeremy Ring | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer PO Box 670311 Coral Springs FL 33067 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. .

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Fight Trump's "secret" war against marijuana
body:
Add your name now.

(http://www.drugpolicy.org?ms=2A1_1810DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy19democrats&cid=70141000000vEKXAA2&utm_content=2A1_1810DemsAcq1)

(https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/take-action-trumps-secret-plot-against-marijuana?ms=2A1_1810DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy19democrats&cid=70141000000vEKXAA2&utm_content=2A1_1810DemsAcq1)

The lengths to which this administration will go to escalate the drug war are appalling. A new report has shed light on even greater attempts to undermine marijuana legalization.

It has exposed the White House as having tasked a multi-agency committee — known, misleadingly, as the Marijuana Policy Coordination Committee — to counter evidence-based, pro-marijuana messaging across the nation.

The Drug Policy Alliance needs like-minded advocates like you to fight this regressive, unethical secret committee — sign our petition today. (https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/take-action-trumps-secret-plot-against-marijuana?ms=2A1_1810DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy19democrats&cid=70141000000vEKXAA2&utm_content=2A1_1810DemsAcq1)

DPA is the nation’s leading organization fighting to end the drug war, and the policies that fuel mass incarceration and the overdose crisis. We are horrified by this blatant move to distort evidence and portray marijuana as a national threat.

By signing our petition, you are joining our community to tell Members of Congress that the federal prohibition of marijuana and the drug war must end — add your name now. (https://engage.drugpolicy.org/secure/take-action-trumps-secret-plot-against-marijuana?ms=2A1_1810DemsAcq1&utm_campaign=fy19democrats&cid=70141000000vEKXAA2&utm_content=2A1_1810DemsAcq1)

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: President Trump Visits Hurricane-Torn Florida, Georgia
body:
| |
---
#
# **_President Trump Visits Hurricane-Torn Florida, Georgia_**
#
President Donald J. Trump, along with First Lady Melania Trump, “toured hurricane-torn areas of Florida and Georgia on Monday, declaring that ‘nobody has seen anything like this’ as crews continued to restore power and residents grappled with the devastation,” Alex Leary reports for _The Wall Street Journal_. The President also singled out the hard, often dangerous work of first responders and law enforcement. “The job they’ve done in Florida has been incredible and likewise, I’m hearing in Georgia very good things.” [**Click here to read more**.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MjgzNjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjI4MzY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxNTI4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/trump-visits-hurricane-torn-florida-offers-praise-and-support-1539627865) “The Obama administration released thousands of unaccompanied alien children to criminal sponsors,” Dr. Jason Piccolo, a former ICE Supervisor, writes in the [**_Washington Examiner_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MjgzNjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjI4MzY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxNTI4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/opinion/op-eds/finally-the-government-has-taken-steps-to-stop-releasing-unaccompanied-minors-to-criminals-and-traffickers). “I know because I was the Homeland Security whistleblower who legally came forward in late 2015 to the U.S. Office of Special Counsel and to Sen. Chuck Grassley’s office about the releases. And I thought it was wrong. Only now is this serious and dangerous problem finally being dealt with.” In Fox News, [**CMS Administrator Seema Verma**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MjgzNjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjI4MzY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxNTI4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/signs-stability-individual-health-care-market/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) writes that usually this time of year is greeted with dread, as millions of Americans have had to purchase health insurance in the volatile Obamacare exchange with its skyrocketing premiums. “The Trump administration inherited this market chaos and, once President Trump took office, he acted immediately to help people harmed by ObamaCare. The results of his immediate action are already showing.” In [**_The Washington Post_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MjgzNjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjI4MzY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxNTI4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.washingtonpost.com/national/health-science/tv-ads-for-drugs-will-send-patients-to-websites-with-pricing-information/2018/10/15/b74ac344-d090-11e8-b2d2-f397227b43f0_story.html?utm_term=.aff84d3346f2), Amy Goldstein and Carolyn Y. Johnson report that the Trump Administration is proposing a new rule requiring pharmaceutical companies to list the price of medicines on television ads—“the boldest in a series of efforts by the Trump administration to curb rampant drug spending.” “For those on the left and right who were certain that Donald Trump’s presidency meant the end of global free trade . . . think again,” Stephen Moore writes in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MjgzNjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjI4MzY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxNTI4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/14/donald-trumps-north-american-trade-triumph/). The mostly tariff-free North American trade zone resulting from the new deal with Mexico and Canada “was Ronald Reagan’s vision nearly four decades ago — and that legacy will now live on for hopefully many years to come.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MjgzNjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjI4MzY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxNTI4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MjgzNjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjI4MzY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxNTI4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MjgzNjcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjI4MzY3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxNTI4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
---

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen Campaign Manager
subject: I wanted to say something real quick about Governor Bredesen’s message from yesterday
body:
| Peter, I wanted to say something real quick about Governor Bredesen’s message from yesterday (read it below). Unlike most campaigns (we know you’re probably getting a lot of their emails right now), we’re not asking for your help because of some arbitrary internal fundraising goal. The donations we’re getting ahead of tomorrow’s deadline are going directly to the ads and field work that’s helping us get voters to the polls and make our closing argument to undecided voters. **Your support is how we’re going to reach them in the final weeks of this race, so that’s why we’re asking: can we count on you to you add a donation of $10 or more before tomorrow’s final FEC fundraising deadline?** **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** | **[Chip in $10 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2667965/16256582/502996468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTZjZjBmZC01MGQxLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uhz1N4kn-bgLBt7qHKWeRTz-jgQ4UrLbBqfS1QR2yk4=&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em181016-mm-7-express-tag&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=)**
---
As always, thanks for your help,
Bob Corney, Campaign Manager

* * *

Peter, let me be frank: I don’t enjoy asking for money. But unlike my opponent, Congresswoman Blackburn, I’m not counting on the Washington Swamp to give us the resources we need to win this campaign.
**I’m counting on you, Peter.**
Let me explain where things stand, and why I’m asking for your help right now. Two days from now, early voting will open up in Tennessee and voters will begin casting their ballots. Election Day is only a few weeks later.
**That means we have only a couple days left until we need to start activating our Get Out the Vote (GOTV) operation, and then only a few weeks left to win over undecided voters.**
The donations we get from grassroots supporters like you ahead of Wednesday’s FEC fundraising deadline will be more critical to our campaign than at any other point in this race so far.

clean_body: | Peter, I wanted to say something real quick about Governor Bredesen’s message from yesterday (read it below). Unlike most campaigns (we know you’re probably getting a lot of their emails right now), we’re not asking for your help because of some arbitrary internal fundraising goal. The donations we’re getting ahead of tomorrow’s deadline are going directly to the ads and field work that’s helping us get voters to the polls and make our closing argument to undecided voters. Your support is how we’re going to reach them in the final weeks of this race, so that’s why we’re asking: can we count on you to you add a donation of $10 or more before tomorrow’s final FEC fundraising deadline? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = As always, thanks for your help, Bob Corney, Campaign Manager Peter, let me be frank: I don’t enjoy asking for money. But unlike my opponent, Congresswoman Blackburn, I’m not counting on the Washington Swamp to give us the resources we need to win this campaign. I’m counting on you, Peter. Let me explain where things stand, and why I’m asking for your help right now. Two days from now, early voting will open up in Tennessee and voters will begin casting their ballots. Election Day is only a few weeks later. That means we have only a couple days left until we need to start activating our Get Out the Vote (GOTV) operation, and then only a few weeks left to win over undecided voters. The donations we get from grassroots supporters like you ahead of Wednesday’s FEC fundraising deadline will be more critical to our campaign than at any other point in this race so far. So even though I don’t like asking, I have to: can you add your donation of $10 or whatever you can so we can get out the vote and finish this race strong and win? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** I’m grateful I can count on your help when we need it most. Thanks for being on my team, Phil Bredesen Paid for by Bredesen Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Bredesen for Senate and the Tennessee Democratic Party Bredesen Victory Fund P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

name: Josh Mahony
subject: Womack Doesn't Want You To Know
body:
Friend,
It's been one week since Steve Womack and I took the debate stage. Shortly after that debate, I was telling anyone that would listen about how happy I was that I was able to share my values with the voters of Northwest Arkansas. It seems Congressman Womack was less proud of his performance.
Steve Womack has not mentioned the debate one time since it happened. He has not acknowledged the stark contrast between the two of us. Why? Womack does not want you to know that there are leaders that will stand up for the people and against the powerful, because he isn't one of those leaders.
_**What is Womack afraid of? You. He knows that the more people like you that find out what his values are, the less likely he is to get re-elected. That's why you are such an important part of our campaign.**_
_**Our team is reserving television time so that we can talk to voters about our vision for Northwest Arkansas. I need you to chip in whatever you can so that we can make as large of a buy as possible. Let's make sure every voter knows just why Steve Womack isn't proud of his record.**_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2668985/16265440/-1826915792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzExOTdkNi01NWQxLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oYj1zy2_cU-VoBeM_o63voZtxUMCpd34YT0oFfGe9bg=)
Please contribute today to keep us on the air!
Josh

subject: Hey, here's a video message for you:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366c/9e00690/509d93ab/240056d6/751690084/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181010_rjaivid_fnd_gq_nono_resend_AGcom_ettx&source=em18_181010_rjaivid_fnd_gq_nono_resend_AGcom_ettx")
Friends,

Listen, there are endless reasons why you should invest in Mayor Andrew Gillum as our next Governor -- and there's no one better to hear it from than someone who knows him best: R. Jai Gillum, Mayor Gillum's wife and the next First Lady of Florida.

**[Watch this message from R. Jai and then chip in $5 or more to help Mayor Gillum get one step closer to rebuilding our state into one that works for every Floridian.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366c/9e00690/509d93ab/240056e9/751690084/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-rjai-invest-video-resend?gpsid=13_55_4295&refcode=em18_181010_rjaivid_fnd_gq_nono_resend_AGcom_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181010_rjaivid_fnd_gq_nono_resend_AGcom_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=2+-+Watch+this+message+from+R+Jai+and+then+c")**

Mayor Gillum's commitment to fighting for affordable healthcare for all Floridians, his progressive plans to invest in our public schools, teachers, and students, and his dedication to fighting for common sense gun reform make him the leader Florida needs. But with only a few weeks left until the general election, it's all hands on deck to keep this momentum going.

**[So please, take a few minutes to watch R. Jai's video and then chip in $5.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb366c/9e00690/509d93ab/240056eb/751690084/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-rjai-invest-video-resend?gpsid=13_55_4295&refcode=em18_181010_rjaivid_fnd_gq_nono_resend_AGcom_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181010_rjaivid_fnd_gq_nono_resend_AGcom_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=4+-+So+please+take+a+few+minutes+to+watch+R+")**

Thank you,

Team Gillum

| | Peter **[I’ve been going over our key supporter list ensuring that everyone knows about our critical midnight fundraising deadline tonight.](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjkyhjz-kujulhlke-j/) You’re the last name on my list.** We need to finish strong by meeting our fundraising goals tonight so that we can send Sleepin’ Joe packing and elect a real Hoosier to the Senate. Ben sent an email earlier. Did you see it? Emily Daniels
Campaign Finance Director \---Begin Forwarded Message--- Friend,
# **Tonight is the most critical deadline of the entire election cycle and time’s almost up.**
We need to meet our [fundraising goal](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjkyhjz-kujulhlke-t/) in order to support all of our final GOTV efforts through Election Day. Food for volunteers, materials for doorknockers, gas for our grassroots teams to get around, all of it hinges on your support. Can you [chip in just $25](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjkyhjz-kujulhlke-i/) to help us meet that goal and finish strong? **There’s a lot riding on this election.[Give today and let’s retire Sleepin’ Joe and drain the DC Swamp once and for all.](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjkyhjz-kujulhlke-d/)** Ben Mitchell
Campaign Manager [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jjkyhjz-kujulhlke-h/) |

Peter,

Meeting our goal for this week's FEC deadline is a powerful signal to both our candidates and their opponents that we have the resources to win big in November.

We're happy to report that after two days, we've already raised $207,366!

But we need to raise the remaining $192,634 before midnight Wednesday.

**Donate $3 now to help close the gap, reach our goal, and elect hundreds of pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-FEC-Deadline-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118cbc61/24c69fd9/22b2c8176/18ba87fc/2629301425/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20181014_email_FECDeadline?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitFECDeadlineGo&utm_campaign=WQEFEV71N_digital_email_20181016_FECLaunchKicker_inact&source=WQEFEV71N_digital_email_20181016_FECLaunchKicker_inact")**

the EMILY's List team

name: Jason Yates
subject: Voting absentee? Don’t forget!
body:
Peter,
Don’t vote _absent_ this election cycle—vote absentee!
If you are not able to make it to the polls on November 6th, make sure you turn in your absentee ballot!
Don’t miss this incredible opportunity to let our faith influence our culture.
Voting isn’t just about you or me—it’s about others.
VOTE for Americans who don’t have a voice but will be impacted by the choices we make in this election:
* **The unborn** who in some states can still be aborted—literally DAYS before their inaugural birthdays.
* **The next generation of young people** \- your children and grandchildren - who will grow up in the America we vote for this November.

If you value your freedom of speech, religion and all rights uniquely American, commit to voting today.
* Learn about the requirements for absentee voting.
* **Which candidates best represent your values?** Check out the [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOGI9lV6CVCs-MnMF1L3QcC-ws4U96v6-vyPHathj7M6QQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181016com01&n=1) to view voting guides and read **about each of the candidates on your ballot** by **[viewing your full sample ballot](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOGI9lV6CVCs-MnMF1L3QcC-nILVINegLKBjrkUhuyMymg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181016com01&n=2).**

This November election, don’t waste your opportunity to protect life and care for those in your community and our nation through your vote. **Take some time to prepare—and then fill out your absentee ballot.**
**Pray** fervently for God’s wisdom.
**Think** about the issues from a Biblical perspective.
Then**VOTE** for the protection and advancement of biblical values in our great country!
And when you do, you join millions of Christians across the country standing united for Christian principles.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181016com01&n=3)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181016com01&n=4).

name: Molly Kelly
subject: It's an honor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
Friends - I was so incredibly honored to receive these kind words from President Obama:
[](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a33/d0ce7de/502df7cf/9cdb832/2232361697/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk166-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
**New Hampshire needs a leader who will finally put working families first - who understands that for one of us to succeed, we all must succeed. And that's exactly how I'll lead as your governor. **
Unlike Chris Sununu, who falls deeper into the pocket of his right-wing corporate mega-donors like the Koch network every day, I won't accept any donations from corporate special interests. I'm accountable to the people of New Hampshire. That's it.
**But that means I can 't win this race without your grassroots support. That's why I'm asking you to give $5 or more right now to help me hit this crucial $10,000 goal tonight so we can keep this campaign strong and flip New Hampshire blue. **
**I 'm counting on you, friends: ****[_Can you give $5 or more - anything you can spare - right now to help me win in November and fight for families like yours in Concord?_](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a33/d0ce7de/502df7cf/9cdb832/2232361697/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk166-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Molly

name: Susie Turnbull
subject: The power of words
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Larry Hogan's indifference is toxic.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378a10/7ab0e2c4/7e184f1a/349874d8/2474443211/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10168A") Friend, There's nothing as dangerous as indifference. I've learned that by watching the disastrous effects that Republican policies can have on women and families. Indifference is what Larry Hogan showed recently when he refused to stand with Dr. Christine Blasey Ford, and that does more harm to the women of this state than is possible to put into words. This indifference is part of a pattern -- he was indifferent when Maryland slipped further behind our neighbors in Virginia, Pennsylvania, Delaware, and D.C. He didn't seem to mind a bit when health care costs went up for working families while our public schools got less and less funding. I'm running with Ben because I know we can do better, and part of that is speaking out when we need to about the things that matter. Ben's spent his life fighting for what's right, and so have I -- together, we'll fight for better opportunities for all Marylanders. **We have a winning message that voters believe in, and they need to hear it. That's why we need to raise $50,000 by Thursday to keep our ads on the air, to give volunteers the support they need on the ground, and to get out the vote starting NOW.** [**Will you donate $5 or more now to fund the fight?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378a10/7ab0e2c4/7e184f1a/349874d8/2474443211/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10168A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378a10/7ab0e2c4/7e184f1a/349874db/2474443211/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10168A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

clean_body: Larry Hogan's indifference is toxic. | "" Friend, There's nothing as dangerous as indifference. I've learned that by watching the disastrous effects that Republican policies can have on women and families. Indifference is what Larry Hogan showed recently when he refused to stand with Dr. Christine Blasey Ford, and that does more harm to the women of this state than is possible to put into words. This indifference is part of a pattern -- he was indifferent when Maryland slipped further behind our neighbors in Virginia, Pennsylvania, Delaware, and D.C. He didn't seem to mind a bit when health care costs went up for working families while our public schools got less and less funding. I'm running with Ben because I know we can do better, and part of that is speaking out when we need to about the things that matter. Ben's spent his life fighting for what's right, and so have I -- together, we'll fight for better opportunities for all Marylanders. We have a winning message that voters believe in, and they need to hear it. That's why we need to raise $50,000 by Thursday to keep our ads on the air, to give volunteers the support they need on the ground, and to get out the vote starting NOW. "" Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" Thanks, Susie "" * PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

name: Tim Ryan
subject: quick update from the trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
I was in Ohio campaigning with Game Changers Aftab Pureval (OH-01) and Theresa Gasper (OH-10). Folks here are tired of a Republican Congress that puts billionaires first -- and they are ready to elect | |
---
Folks: I was just in Southwest Ohio campaigning with Game Changers **Aftab Pureval (OH-01)** and **Theresa Gasper (OH-10)**. Ohioans here are tired of a Republican Congress that always puts billionaires first -- and they are ready to elect Aftab, Theresa, and game-changing Democrats up and down the ticket. [Early voting is ALREADY underway! Make sure our Game Changers have the resources to turn out every voter and win BIG -- donate $1 or more to each of our candidates now >> ](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9316/5486deaa/2bb7a5d4/dcf3736/2924309173/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_gamechangers?refcode=em20181016_aftabtheresa_oh&tandembox=show&amount=12") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9316/5486deaa/2bb7a5d4/dcf3739/2924309173/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_gamechangers?refcode=em20181016_aftabtheresa_oh&tandembox=show&amount=12") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9316/5486deaa/2bb7a5d4/dcf3739/2924309173/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_gamechangers?refcode=em20181016_aftabtheresa_oh&tandembox=show&amount=12") [DONATE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9316/5486deaa/2bb7a5d4/dcf3739/2924309173/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_gamechangers?refcode=em20181016_aftabtheresa_oh&tandembox=show&amount=12") From the Midwest to the Deep South, we're fighting for candidates with real-world experience to infuse Washington with a new sense of problem-solving and purpose. But folks like Aftab and Theresa are up against millions of dollars in attacks from super PACs, dark money groups, and D.C. Republicans who will do anything to protect the status quo. # Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9316/5486deaa/2bb7a5d4/dcf3723/2924309173/VEsHAw/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9316/5486deaa/2bb7a5d4/dcf3722/2924309173/VEsHAg/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")

Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9316/5486deaa/2bb7a5d4/dcf3721/2924309173/VEsHDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: DWS (Congresswoman)
subject: beat the "Brett bump"
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | **"Republicans hoping 'Brett bounce' from Supreme Court battle will boost their midterms chances"**
\-- _Telegraph_ ; 10/6/2018 Republicans think Kavanaugh's nomination will give them a bump on Election Day. That is why they rushed him onto the Court, after all -- not because he belonged there, but because they needed a political win. [**It's up to us to make sure Republicans aren't rewarded for using a Supreme Court vacancy as a political boost. We need $218,000 to finish out the final month of this election. Can you give?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c82/622b7b5b/1d5f23ad/307b6889/776782911/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181016?refcode=dwse181016_b&recurring=true&amount=5") GOP leaders have made it no secret they want to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and "reform" (aka cut) Medicare and Social Security. To them, much like the Supreme Court vacancy, these programs are just pieces in a political game -- to be maneuvered for their own purposes. But to people in Florida who suffer from asthma, cancer, diabetes, or any number of pre-existing conditions, the ACA is the only reason they can get insurance -- and insurance companies can't over-charge them for it. To seniors, Medicare is a lifeline that gives them the chance to see doctors, go to the hospital, or get necessary prescriptions without breaking the bank. To retirees, Social Security is a guarantee that growing older won't mean growing poorer, ensuring you can retire with dignity. **Governing isn't just about politics -- we have a responsibility to the people who elect us to do what's right for them.** Republicans have lost sight of that. This November, we have to hold them accountable. [**I won't stop fighting -- and I hope I can count on you to do the same. Rush in a contribution, no matter what the amount, to get us to our October goal.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c82/622b7b5b/1d5f23ad/307b6889/776782911/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181016?refcode=dwse181016_b&recurring=true&amount=5") | | | [Donate Now](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c82/622b7b5b/1d5f23ad/307b6889/776782911/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181016?refcode=dwse181016_b&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
Thank you.
Debbie

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: My record speaks for itself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | I face my final Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline before the election tomorrow.

This is the first fundraising report I'll file since a national Libertarian super PAC swooped into New Mexico to support Gary Johnson. **I think my record speaks for itself, but I cannot get drowned out by dark-money groups trying to sway the election. Read more below on what progress could be lost if I 'm defeated this year, or if you've heard enough, _[help me reach our new fundraising goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+help+me+reach+our+new+fundraising+goal+b&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**I have been leading the conversation on cybersecurity and the threats we face from foreign hackers.** Beyond our election infrastructure, our energy grid and transportation systems are also susceptible to hacking attacks, with potentially disastrous consequences. We secured $380 million for election security earlier this year, and my amendment to establish a national cyber warfare doctrine passed the Senate last month.

**I 've also been fighting to protect investments in our rural transportation infrastructure in New Mexico.** The Senate recently passed my bipartisan amendment for an additional $50 million to help maintain the Southwest Chief Amtrak route. Trains help connect New Mexico to the rest of the country, and keeping this route is critical to the local economy and the rural communities that rely on this line.
[DONATE $29 NOW >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4") **And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am fighting to protect them.** I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area -- a sacred place to all New Mexicans -- from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives -- and that has Gary Johnson, Republicans, and super PACs worried.

**Midnight Wednesday is the last FEC reporting deadline before the election, and****afterwards****I will have to report my fundraising numbers for the final time. With early voting starting this weekend, we cannot afford to miss this goal and be shorthanded for the final weeks of the election.**

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To report our strongest FEC numbers yet, our new budget goal is to raise $40,830 before our deadline tomorrow. All this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme opponents defeats me in November. Will you contribute now and help us close our budget gap before we must publically report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4")** Thank you for standing with me,

Martin

Make sure to follow the campaign on **[Twitter](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b418/43d8135f/663f7ff9/5101b034/2116132198/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4")** and **[Facebook.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b418/43d8135f/663f7ff9/5101b037/2116132198/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4")**

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b418/43d8135f/663f7ff9/5101b036/2116132198/VEsHBA/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b418/43d8135f/663f7ff9/5101b039/2116132198/VEsHBw/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_1_4").

Martin Heinrich for Senate
PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125

Voting early is a quick, easy, and safe way to make sure your voice is heard. **[To vote in person, you can find your polling place here.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d550/c1f7015/6ffd3e10/11416b28/325565111/VEsE/ "https://www.tinaforminnesota.com/act/vote-early?utm_source=TinaSmith&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rtw_20181016_email")** [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d550/c1f7015/6ffd3e10/11416b28/325565111/VEsF/ "https://www.tinaforminnesota.com/act/vote-early?utm_source=TinaSmith&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rtw_20181016_email") This will be one of the most important elections in our lifetime -- and we can't afford to leave anything to chance. subject: [voting early] you’re eligible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |
body:
Did you know you can vote early? ALL registered Hoosier voters are eligible to vote early from now until Monday, November 5 at their county election.. [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=d648c4926f6f4a99b0690595190de4fe&_e=4rDm4ArQ821XAqbAKz6GWSK4qvL9dhwW4G3i-x6SgC2n300rJUXjwt8h3UeoSYPYy-NeVQn7M4vZ4_T4vZOeyX5cY7GY1sOAH2R73gbqUGFpvd_nCZ-yjF7HTRwXGxp3o5TLAKoR0z07t-CHbdGdJpcCoIWV-rBMR_6o_bosiez7bjiBzz1bC64dqv9zWPnXYSd_wlwJ-XzdqzsS6ldP0nPw8mPRZcqEv5cdxSPW8hrcxyMmEwsF9s1w_DUP0rWDyM5-Ig_xmDtu9jcJXW_nka0XdNKAL7IRc34b8lnzsuhJyA-esIFCxPf4rzI82RYemCZE67lh5h3KseLpyyK3elM8YPdwV1RBQFYfBoaIs4x1Ni9cI3wSJdgN5esgYeelxlqLADmD24gexz7h4tuk1w%3D%3D) | |

_Did you know you can vote early?_

**ALL registered Hoosier voters are eligible** to vote early from now until Monday, November 5 at their county election board office.

Need more information on early voting locations and hours?

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: last night’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
It was a distinct honor to stand up on stage and share my vision for Central Virginia with voters in our community. I am confident that, with you by my side, this moment will represent a turning point for our campaign.
| | Peter, Last night, I faced off with Rep. Dave Brat in our first, and likely only, debate of this campaign. It was a distinct honor to stand up on stage and share my vision for Central Virginia with voters in our community. I made the case for investing in rural broadband and offered my plans to bring down the cost of prescription drugs. I pledged to focus on consensus-building to deliver tangible results for the 7th district, and I asked for our community's trust and support in this race. Rep. Brat, perhaps unsurprisingly, insisted on misrepresenting my positions on the issues. But I stayed focused on policy, **and we kept Rep. Brat accountable for his hypocritical voting record, his refusal to compromise, and his repeated false statements about me.** **And I say we, Peter, because I would not have been on that stage, making my case to voters, without you.** This community of grassroots supporters is the backbone of our campaign to bring positive change to VA-7, and it is because of you that this once-safely Republican district is now a tied race. There are exactly three weeks left until Election Day, and I would appreciate [**your continued support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AswqYlB4uR2y9Q7PmbGPXe0MtcUJJXo-CrdGeGhLhAY=/WLxjA1lDlxbVbSSYxB9xPa-B6xifdD5cSKYLiHg50h4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) over the next 21 days. Already, we have received some incredible feedback on my performance in the debate, **and I am confident that, with you by my side, this moment will represent a turning point for our campaign.** It will take hard work, right up until the polls close on November 6th, but we can and will surge to a lead. [**Peter, consider making a donation of any size to help me finish this race strong.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AswqYlB4uR2y9Q7PmbGPXe0MtcUJJXo-CrdGeGhLhAY=/WLxjA1lDlxbVbSSYxB9xPa-B6xifdD5cSKYLiHg50h4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) You will make a difference. Thank you, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AswqYlB4uR2y9Q7PmbGPXe0MtcUJJXo-CrdGeGhLhAY=/WLxjA1lDlxbVbSSYxB9xPa-B6xifdD5cSKYLiHg50h4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AswqYlB4uR2y9Q7PmbGPXe0MtcUJJXo-CrdGeGhLhAY=/WLxjA1lDlxbVbSSYxB9xPa-B6xifdD5cSKYLiHg50h4=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/AswqYlB4uR2y9Q7PmbGPXe0MtcUJJXo-CrdGeGhLhAY=/fYDdtrqzQ6V1JIpIQuzyPoL9v3PSJvrp93kPvX4gl5g=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
