name: Jamal Raad, Team Inslee
subject: That report is keeping me up at night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ba7c/2f5ea88d/74ae9274/2cbc6169/1363522187/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&refcode=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&utm_campaign=mid-month-3&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, Did you see the major climate report last week? It's seriously giving me nightmares to think that our planet has only until 2030 to prevent catastrophic climate change, or else we'll see horrific effects as soon as 2040. I don't know about you, but I sure don't want my nephews to grow up in a world of droughts and wildfires, floods and disease. I want them to be able to see glaciers in more than just textbooks. And I don't want them to ask me why we didn't act to prevent climate change, when we still had the chance. We all must ask what more we can do to face this existential challenge, for us and our planet. **No matter what you and I do to curtail our own carbon emissions, we need political leaders to step up and take action right now to hold big polluters accountable.[And there's no one working hard than Jay Inslee to lead states to take action -- so will you join me in supporting him today?](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ba7c/2f5ea88d/74ae9274/2cbc6169/1363522187/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&refcode=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&utm_campaign=mid-month-3&utm_medium=ema")** | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ba7c/2f5ea88d/74ae9274/2cbc6169/1363522187/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&refcode=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&utm_campaign=mid-month-3&utm_medium=ema")
---
I know Jay Inslee, and I can tell you -- he's serious about fighting climate change. This is why he is in public life. He literally wrote the book on clean energy policy, back in 2007. So believe me when I tell you -- if anyone can help us prevent the worst effects of global warming, it's Jay Inslee.
[**In light of this terrible IPCC report from the UN, we need climate leaders like Jay Inslee to fight for us and to demand more from Trump and his band of climate deniers. So I'm asking you now, before our mid-month deadline on Wednesday: Will you chip in right now and help Jay demand real climate action from our national leaders?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ba7c/2f5ea88d/74ae9274/2cbc6169/1363522187/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&refcode=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&utm_campaign=mid-month-3&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks -- it will help me sleep at night knowing you're on our team to fight against climate change.
Yours truly,
Jamal Raad
Team Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ba7c/2f5ea88d/74ae9274/2cbc6169/1363522187/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&refcode=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&utm_campaign=mid-month-3&utm_medium=ema")
---

_Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7ba7c/2f5ea88d/74ae9274/2cbc6169/1363522187/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&refcode=ema_2018-10-16_mid-month-3&utm_campaign=mid-month-3&utm_medium=ema")

name: Bob Hugin for Senate
subject: Bob Menendez's Stunning Hypocrisy on Women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
Public has a right to know the facts and decide for themselves | |
---
**Senator Menendez Can’t Selectively “Believe Women”**
_Public has a right to know the facts and decide for themselves_
|
---
[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=037218322b9d4addaa08e0cd55af6ea0&_e=2c9SHou5T2pAVCTTx3LVd5QTUmlOBut6vA_Rq3i9okl3Sph9qwg-jo56bmdAzBLwUoo7Kdg3NJaqosVg1wHI_4MemQ12jqwVL-HnRtw_dbGRj_TenxCXclFqMW5vFfpqq6qnONd0xRwXH_DifGOKQOeZ8CmBXY5LSYDEhvTj1RWWKaews4nO6CNu2Z6NIEpnf26oQil4ht6aZRCsBNIvkSKJB7QxtCP3cjLJioaH4obQ0v9YeLY_C-Guko6Qu1CmjaQ6Yu2Jl0m5ewFJurO0uuxidecIUcAl2UyHwRY6uDsuixW0FdVFuS9r4KBkDHMDlTEPmc_Tv7L1AzduD-OJVVzTa6YiXEqhwxR52uuRyHc%3D)
|
---
Bob Menendez is a hypocrite. Last week in a speech on the floor of the Senate, Bob Menendez called for all women to be believed. Yet, Menendez claims that no one should believe the underage women who accused him. The public has a right to know all the facts about the FBI investigation into Senator Menendez and decide for themselves.

**FACT:** The FBI and President Obama’s Justice Department had specific, corroborated evidence to back up allegations that Senator Menendez had sex with underage girls in the Dominican Republic. Those women never recanted. It’s also important to note these are not the same women who recanted in affidavits released by Dr. Melgen’s cousin.

**FACT:** The FBI also discovered a “black book” listing Menendez 9 separate times alongside the names and phone numbers of multiple women in what an FBI agent testified looked to be a ledger of prostitution activity.

**FACT:** The pilot of Menendez’s friend, convicted felon Salomon Melgen, also testified he flew “young girls” who “look[ed] like escorts” on Melgen’s plane. In addition, the FBI confirmed that young women who received substantial sums of money from Dr. Melgen were at Casa De Campo at the same time as Menendez.

**FACT:** Confronted with the FBI’s corroborating evidence that placed Menendez in the same place at the same time the alleged sex with underage victims took place, Menendez lied. The Obama DOJ called his denials “demonstrably false.” Menendez and his legal team argued in federal court documents that these allegations, even if true "would hardly be a crime."
|

name: John Shimkus
subject: Urgent Second Amendment Voter Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus
body:
As you’ve seen in the news, Liberals from Chicago to Springfield are hell-bent on taking away every gun in our state, placing our families and communi
[](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=5c051b1f75ca46cabecaf70199e1b991&_e=9ewOrBP4hvGEGP8YckMA_r1TLYVLT_lCyGupefp5w4bffrVJGBHt2LibsyJzP9bKmgKUASiEBi5fiQzDdX1ApJqVfYAClp0EttYxjfALRAHo1wd2PZfErPS3thSZX9haby1X-SkUhY-W7BzbkUlE4caDLD2rTepNW0z2l8FxRVcqq92bGmxWIUsWwpwIdsGD3LIjRGFcF21dFrhoqwJQVXLUtmWuDcfSXgnlgPq2PBvI7oWCo3fr0a1Dls5Ib6TDpXeaVBqAaUPhd8AFqyPOlgjs78VBiWmWgP73wwRtmEznAPEKJY0qbLtgMqq8eZr_BZRjl03DaixbStk98DVOFmw-QwMzqlQJMQhRxNPDhRhRWS8TBvfJDCkaL8cvX6jqCaKggQn-2tvB0yIioWDlTw%3D%3D)
Friend,

As you’ve seen in the news, Liberals from Chicago to Springfield are hell-bent on taking away every gun in our state, placing our families and communities at risk. **But on November 6, we will have a chance to stop their efforts once and for all.**

They just don’t get it, friend. Passing legislation to ban firearms just doesn’t work. Look at Chicago: their handgun ban has done absolutely nothing to lower crime rates, and has grabbed guns out of the hands of law-abiding citizens who only want to protect their families.

We can’t let dangerous policies like these spread to Southern Illinois.

Friend, on November 6, we will be able to do something about it. **In 47 counties across Illinois, a “Gun Sanctuary” resolution will appear on the ballot, which would ensure that radical policies to grab our guns can have no real effect.** Nearly every county in our district will have the chance to vote for this resolution.
[Commit to Protecting our Second Amendment](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=5c051b1f75ca46cabecaf70199e1b991&_e=9ewOrBP4hvGEGP8YckMA_kTQWnEV7Ot07BpIu0IoVSFmNC9hexlRaJg8_5Rd1jFglc5EFigjA3sgeb8vjL-bhRAqaXueJdgRIbtCkyfAkOn2wpNGL5VFHVrE94gL5UGx_ccLnC2maaD8kaTMiOehwwOavPRXaM4p9vfCvlD2OzJNZgreR8G8GdQz1Q8_D_Eykcfxmh5cDdrLBb11DagcsrFY4DHjRg6dQg1GV1_lmlLah21d-sEuVILVQkeGORUuDbiPMxd-CxPDVlO_DQTAK9VWQSYK737sy6lUNS8boL25ih_-jAvGGW0mlSvuKbRK4GRER3METchoubEbxlJOz9Hat5KYah5KWr5m70JFUW4YcQFAhYihWdgAWycKtLPGCPdgYyROAfCjZOfzOQ75lV-u9Vks1jt3ftIGhVvOUGjy1lovGu23eKfI0I7oX42g)
---

The only sure way to protect our Second Amendment rights in Illinois is to get to the polls and vote YES on the Gun Sanctuary resolution.

You can get all the information you need about how to vote on or before November 6 **_[here.](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=5c051b1f75ca46cabecaf70199e1b991&_e=3LIVm6B_GfrsdSV_bec7QLJpVEgOQaFWzYRYG0Bk2MZyJQ9t_l4KROIEa1X9TkXWTYslahYPfsSGSk9InpqhYvlowo5kAbeZdesOW3GxHZQSdqLwI7gLpImkAQHqy9F5luITQyc0ARifqfc8QfDsXEWJqBc7ikfcf40SXUgni8hWhrvXMU6UOQ0CTbl8apbECxu--rvyT_S8cZYpziK9s6QSoi6LyRrLL8aOZUyFevK0mEtC83rOaFX41FQIlirzbQc2kw9_m7XsfAwribI-DQ%3D%3D)_**

Please join me in standing up for our rights on November 6

Sincerely,

John

Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus.
---
[Unsubscribe](http://links.johnshimkus.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_s=5c051b1f75ca46cabecaf70199e1b991&_t=gY1y0oVx4Q25Npk6cpclXFdbhH3FUpDSz-dgIYBlvdA5d1NFiGTLCXVOwTNt3gMRiTOuQhLYdwUaCDUWRlAmSqswSITSqiH5eo4ygMwPvT3NXdtXoEiPxRlgH34T6CGXqh2EQdp-O6FM2MyIPEFQXlVIoq6CKmdnKx1pmPHDxFI%3D)

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: I’m very sad to see that.
body:
| Peter -- Shouting, bickering, and division have become the standard approach in Washington to fixing the big problems facing our state and our nation. And I’m very sad to see that. **Take the opioid crisis, for example.** Last year, we lost 1,268 Tennesseans to opioid overdoses. Over the past 10 years, opioid-related hospitalizations have increased ten-fold. It’s not a new problem -- it’s one that politicians in Washington, including my opponent, Congresswoman Blackburn, have known about for years. They’re well aware of the devastation that the opioid epidemic has left in its wake. But like many issues in front of Congress, the politicians in the Washington Swamp haven’t just done nothing -- they’ve actually made things worse. **For instance, Congresswoman Blackburn, who accepted more than $800,000 in campaign contributions from drug companies, pushed legislation through Congress that weakened the DEA’s ability to monitor suspicious drug shipments.** We’ve built this campaign on the principle that our greatest problems are solved when people from all walks of life tackle them together. And when I get to Congress, I’ll throw out the Washington playbook and work with anyone who’s ready to make our government do big things again. That’s the message we’re putting in front of voters in the final weeks of this campaign. But without your help, we won’t have the resources we need to drown out the attacks coming out of Washington. **By donating $10 or whatever you can ahead of tomorrow’s deadline, you’ll help send a clear message to the Swamp -- Washington is broken, and it’s time to fix it. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Fight back against voter suppression in Georgia.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Let us stand together against voter suppression and for American democracy.
Elections should be about candidates making the best case they can to their constituents and letting the voters decide. What elections should not be about in a democratic society is winning because your opponents are prevented from voting. And let's be clear: That is exactly what cowardly Republicans are doing right now.
In Georgia, Democrats have an outstanding progressive candidate for governor, Stacey Abrams. She happens to be running against the very person, the secretary of state, who controls the voting process in the state. And, pathetically, that person, Brian Kemp, is working overtime to deny many African Americans the right to vote in the upcoming election.
Thankfully the NAACP is taking action. They are not just running one of the most aggressive voter registration campaigns in the country, they are now going to court to make sure everyone, regardless of their race or income, can vote on election day.
**[Taking on reactionary state governments and their undemocratic election laws is an expensive proposition. Will you make a $3 contribution to support the NAACP as they fight for democracy and the right to vote in this critical moment? They are on the front lines of this fight and need our support.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/3608?refcode=em181016-full&t=25&akid=217%2E150750%2E3FR0gW)**
Four years ago, Stacey Abrams’ opponent, the man now in charge of voting in Georgia, made the following statement: “Democrats are working hard, and all these stories about them, you know, registering all these minority voters that are out there and others that are sitting on the sidelines, if they can do that, they can win these elections in November.”
In 2017, his office canceled about 670,000 voter registrations. And now he has put on hold 50,000 new voter registrations in the state, potentially preventing those newly registered from voting. It’s no surprise that 70 percent of the registrations being held up by his office belong to African Americans.
We cannot let this stand. The NAACP is fighting back, filing lawsuits to stop this voter suppression from taking place. We need to do everything we can to support them.
**[Will you make a $3 contribution to support the NAACP as they fight for the right to vote in this critical moment? They are on the front lines of this fight and need our support.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/3608?refcode=em181016-full&t=50&akid=217%2E150750%2E3FR0gW)**
Every American, no matter what his or her political view, must vigorously protest outrageous attempts to suppress the vote.
Our job is to make it easier for people to vote, not harder – regardless of who they plan on voting for. We believe our ideas can win. Clearly Republicans don’t.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[DONATE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/3608?refcode=em181016-full&t=51&akid=217%2E150750%2E3FR0gW)
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=52&akid=217%2E150750%2E3FR0gW). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=53&akid=217%2E150750%2E3FR0gW).

subject: see you Thursday!

body:

name: Kathy Manning
subject: CNN: too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
More good news, team. Another poll shows us within the margin of error. We can win this. I'm sure of it. So are Ted Budd and his special interest friends -- which is why they're spendi
|
---

| | **_"This race is the textbook definition of too close to call."_**
\-- _CNN_ ; 10/16/2018 More good news, team. **Another poll shows us within the margin of error.** We can win this. I'm sure of it. So are Ted Budd and his special interest friends -- **_which is why they're spending tens of thousands of dollars _a day_ to attack me._** Let's make sure that doesn't work. [**We need 180 donors to give $5 or more before midnight to keep the numbers moving in our direction. Will you help?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427911/e3b7d3/5ed12311/25555cea/2189093013/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181016?refcode=kme181016_b") The strength of this campaign took this from a race no one had ever heard of to one of the closest races in the country. We've recruited hundreds of volunteers, knocked on thousands of doors, and talked to thousands of voters all across this district. I'm incredibly proud of the work we've done thus far. But we're coming down to the end here -- **early voting starts __tomorrow__**. North Carolinians are about to cast ballots, and we need to make sure they know the choice they face. [**We need this grassroots boost today. So if you can, be one of the 180 donors to give before midnight.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427911/e3b7d3/5ed12311/25555cea/2189093013/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181016?refcode=kme181016_b") I'm energized by these numbers today. We can win. Let's get over the finish line. Kathy | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427911/e3b7d3/5ed12311/25555cea/2189093013/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181016?refcode=kme181016_b")

subject: Entering the homestretch
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|

Friend,

I wanted to send you a quick note to thank you for all of your help on this campaign. We have been on the trail for 20 months, and as of today, we are just 3 weeks away from Election Day!

We're going to have to give it everything we've got -- let's keep knocking on doors, making phone calls, and spreading our positive vision for One Minnesota far and wide. **This work doesn 't happen on its own though -- we need your help.**

A well-organized Get Out the Vote effort can result in as much as a 2-point difference in an election. With the race tightening, that could mean the difference between winning and losing. The stakes are too high.

**Will you support our voter outreach efforts?**

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Democrats won’t let you keep your doctor . . . or your health insurance
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 16, 2018
## Democrats won’t let you keep your doctor . . . or your health insurance
##
**Not so long ago, Democrats lied** repeatedly**** as they tried to sell an unpopular Obamacare bill to the American people. “If you like your doctor, you can keep your doctor. If you like your health care plan, you can keep your health care plan,” President Barack Obama told an audience in Portsmouth, New Hampshire, in August 2009. **Now, Democrats will say anything** to sell “Medicare for All”—an even more radical government takeover of your healthcare. **The difference?** This time, Americans have the evidence to know better. Nearly 5 million Americans saw their plans canceled during Obamacare’s first year. As for keeping your doctor, President Obama later admitted families would have to “make choices” if they wanted to keep their physicians. He also promised these families that the “Affordable Care Act” would cut $2,500 from their premiums. In fact, average individual market premiums more than doubled from 2013 to 2017\. **False promises** were the only way Democrats were able to ram Obamacare through Congress without a single Republican vote. And just like Obamacare, there’s a lot in the new “Medicare for All” plan that Democrats don’t want you to know:
* **“Medicare for All” would end private insurance:** Sen. Chuck Schumer (D-NY) claims this isn’t true. He should read his own party’s bill: “It shall be unlawful for— (1) a private health insurer to sell health insurance coverage that duplicates the benefits provided under this Act.” Americans would have no choice in their basic insurance and be forced onto Medicare.
* **Seniors would lose their benefits:** Popular Medicare Advantage plans enjoyed today by more than 20 million seniors would be outlawed under the Democrats’ plan.
* **It comes with a massive price tag** : Major tax hikes wouldn’t come close to covering the obscene $32 TRILLION 10-year cost projection. Most telling, Sen. Schumer didn’t even deny that the plan would use American taxpayer money to fund government healthcare for illegal immigrants.

**It was only a matter of time** before Democrats needed something more radical to pitch to their base after Obamacare. For the rest of America, the stakes couldn’t be higher. With “Medicare for All”, quality healthcare will plummet. Wait times will skyrocket. Private competition will be eliminated. Lifesaving innovation will be crippled. [**Get the facts: The Democrats’ plan to take away your health insurance**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MzE3MjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjMxNzIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxODM2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/congressional-democrats-want-take-away-doctor-outlaw-private-insurance-put-bureaucrats-charge-healthcare/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Watch:** [**President Trump’s message on “Medicare for All”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MzE3MjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjMxNzIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxODM2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1052216160706420737)
## Video of the day
##
**Yesterday, the President and First Lady** visited both Florida and Georgia, surveying damage from Hurricane Michael. While on the ground, they took time to thank local law enforcement officers, first responders, and volunteers who are giving it all to restore these distressed communities. [**Watch President Trump and the First Lady meet survivors and volunteers.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MzE3MjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjMxNzIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxODM2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mJwKg7b8UsQ)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**First Lady Melania Trump visits Lynn Haven, Florida after Hurricane Michael** | October 15, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MzE3MjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjMxNzIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxODM2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MzE3MjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjMxNzIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxODM2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE2Ljk2MzE3MjIxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNi45NjMxNzIyMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAxODM2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Mel Hall
subject: Are you with me, friend?

body:
I just stepped off the debate stage, friend. I hope I made you and all of my supporters proud tonight.

Despite my opponent's false attacks, I was proud to share my vision for fixing the mess in Washington and getting Congress working for Hoosiers again.

[_**Time is running out before Election Day and so much is riding on this race. I need you with me now more than ever. subject: poll alert (not good)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/iP92z7XcRlqKKOWFp63LsJ_YMtPuAfxg6hY4oY6IPBs=/D9ukTcH3rmwrVU9FAv4Jp4-FnoMSWLIxqUrn7SU7ZYI=?gpsid=37_57_4487&refcode=em18_181016_down5_LG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181016_down5_LG_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---
Friend,

Not much time to write this, so I'll just get right to it: Thanks to our opponent's lies and attack ads, **WE ARE DOWN FIVE POINTS** in the latest poll -- with just four days until early voting begins.

We can still win this, but Steve needs your help to overcome the dark money flowing in toward the Koch-funded Adam Laxalt.

**[$5, $10, $20-- anything will help keep our message on air before the polls open this Saturday.](https://act.myngp.com/el/iP92z7XcRlqKKOWFp63LsJ_YMtPuAfxg6hY4oY6IPBs=/D9ukTcH3rmwrVU9FAv4Jp4-FnoMSWLIxqUrn7SU7ZYI=?gpsid=37_57_4487&refcode=em18_181016_down5_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181016_down5_L1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

I'm really worried that we won't have enough resources to sustain our grassroots campaign. We can't afford to let Nevada families fall behind, and Steve is ready to fight for us if we can get him across the finish line.

There isn't much time left - please give what you can today.

Mandi Karp
Finance Director
Steve Sisolak for Governor

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/iP92z7XcRlqKKOWFp63LsJ_YMtPuAfxg6hY4oY6IPBs=/D9ukTcH3rmwrVU9FAv4Jp4-FnoMSWLIxqUrn7SU7ZYI=?gpsid=37_57_4487&refcode=em18_181016_down5_B1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181016_down5_B1_fnd_gq_act__MK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
---

Friends for Steve Sisolak
P.O. Box 850
Las Vegas NV 89125 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/iP92z7XcRlqKKOWFp63LsJ_YMtPuAfxg6hY4oY6IPBs=/Hczvu3xmkqFflWksQRGhjWy8jrbN0rsmWwTYd9jKKk0=).

**MAKE SURE TO RSVP FOR 10/22 RALLY!** See event details & help the Indiana GOP get out the vote; early voting is already underway! | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/final-push-to-election-day-467325?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4719bf98f1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---

---
| [See you Monday! RSVP to the rally >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ff3c6c4709&e=1acd9bb3d6 "See you Monday! RSVP to the rally >>")
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3557e821c1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Friend,

I've had the opportunity to spend quite a bit of time in Indiana over the years.

It's a special place, _where conservative values and principles are working to deliver big results_.

And I can't wait to see everyone at the HUGE Right Track Results Rally planned for next Monday in Greenfield!

Kimberly Guilfoyle and I look forward to joining Governor Eric Holcomb, Mike Braun, Greg Pence and Indiana's statewide team to share our thoughts on the 2018 elections.

Make sure to **[RSVP](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=13aa50218f&e=1acd9bb3d6)[here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2fc828336e&e=1acd9bb3d6) **letting us know you'll be there...and even if you can't make it, please** ****[make an emergency contribution to the Indiana Republican Party](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c3f8ad64ba&e=1acd9bb3d6)**!

---
| [See you Monday! RUSH your support today >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=df81459d93&e=1acd9bb3d6 "See you Monday! RUSH your support today >>")
---
| [See you Monday! RSVP to the rally >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ea8224bcb8&e=1acd9bb3d6 "See you Monday! RSVP to the rally >>")
---
| Your Republican Party staff and volunteers are working so hard to share the message and get out the vote, **and as you likely know, early voting is already underway. **

We've got solid conservatives on your Indiana ballot -- **folks like Greg Pence, who is ready to serve Hoosiers again. **

And then there is a KEY U.S. Senate race - where we need to _DEFEAT two-faced liberal Joe Donnelly_ \- as well as statewide races, legislative races, and all of the other contests down the ballot that are being decided RIGHT NOW as voters cast ballots across Indiana!

Let me tell you, **my Dad and I are HUGE fans of Donnelly's****opponent****, businessman Mike Braun**.

He's the conservative LEADER Indiana needs, and his campaign operation is working incredibly hard getting the job done on the ground.

If elected, I know he will be a tremendous ally in my father's fight to DRAIN THE SWAMP in Washington and pass his AMERICA FIRST agenda!

**** Again,****[please stand with the Indiana Republican Party with a $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or $500 emergency contribution](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=501e134a22&e=1acd9bb3d6) ****to rush critical support where it’s needed most!**

Joe Donnelly is desperate to dodge accountability now. But FAR too often he has been a Schumer-Pelosi ally in obstructing my father's agenda by any means necessary.

I know you agree - **Indiana needs leaders who will put hard-working Hoosiers and Americans first, NOT the special interests and coastal liberal elites!**

Please make your most **generous contribution** today.

_Kim and I hope to see you next week!_

For Indiana & America,

Donald Trump Jr.

PS: Help KEEP INDIANA RED on November 6th and elect great conservative outsider Mike Braun to the U.S. Senate, _so he can stand with my father and Make America GREAT Again!_ **[Make a secure $10, $25, $50, $100, or $250 contribution today](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c651880c7b&e=1acd9bb3d6).**

** To RSVP for the rally I'll be attending on Monday with Kim, please tap or click [**here**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d51572523d&e=1acd9bb3d6).

name: StaceyAbrams.com
subject: Open for a hilarious pun!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
To kick off the start of in-person early voting, Stacey launched her bus tour! |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8c3/34a064cc/ebcb16b/70d1c1e/2280907006/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Exciting news - To kick off the start of in-person early voting yesterday, Stacey launched our "We Are Georgia - Our Voices. Our Votes. Our Time" Early Vote Bus Tour! Now that we've got our driving playlist and snack stockpile, we're hitting the road! [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8c3/34a064cc/ebcb16b/70d1c1f/2280907006/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDE2MTgtbmQtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE101618-nd-full") Over the next two weeks, we'll be traveling across Georgia to make sure every eligible voter has a plan to vote early. Early voting is our chance to win this election for Stacey Abrams before November 6th. But in order to get it done in the next **21 days** , we need to put the pedal to the metal. (Get it? Driving pun!) We've set a goal of getting 1,000 new donors to step up and make their first contribution to our campaign. We need to keep growing our grassroots army if we want to beat Brian Kemp. None of us wants to wake up on November 7th and wish we had done more. Make your donation using this personalized link so we can count it towards our new donor goal: **[http://secure.staceyabrams.com/new-donor-goal?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8c3/34a064cc/ebcb16b/70d1c1c/2280907006/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzdHlaV1pqYjJSbGZYMD0iOiJJRTEwMTYxOC1uZC1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=IE101618-nd-full")** We know we have a candidate worth fighting for. We know Stacey has the grassroots support she needs to win. Now all we need to do is make sure no one, not a single eligible Georgian, sits this election out. Because when we show up, when we step up, we win. Let's do this! - Team Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa8c3/34a064cc/ebcb16b/70d1c1f/2280907006/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMDE2MTgtbmQtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-october?refcode=IE101618-nd-full")**

|
---

name: Team Menendez
subject: This could mean the difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

According to the last reports filed with the Federal Election Commission, our opponent Bob Hugin has raised over $16 million.

16 million dollars is a lot of money - more than most of us will ever see.

How did Hugin raise that much? Well, funny story: Bob Hugin is a self-funder, meaning most of it is Hugin's own dirty money he "earned" while scamming cancer patients on the cost of life-saving medicine.

Now he is spending that money in an attempt to buy this election and right now, pollsters are saying this race is getting closer. **[But with your help, we can close the fundraising gap and secure a win for the people of New Jersey. Chip in $5 or whatever you can afford and help Democratic Senator Bob Menendez win on November 6th.](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846ced/3af3c5d/39869548/4ec3386b/3009211223/VEsH/ clean_body: Friend, According to the last reports filed with the Federal Election Commission, our opponent Bob Hugin has raised over $16 million. 16 million dollars is a lot of money - more than most of us will ever see. How did Hugin raise that much? Well, funny story: Bob Hugin is a self-funder, meaning most of it is Hugin's own dirty money he "earned" while scamming cancer patients on the cost of life-saving medicine. Now he is spending that money in an attempt to buy this election and right now, pollsters are saying this race is getting closer. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" It's never mattered more, Team Menendez "" | Paid for by Menendez for Senate Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible. "" ""

name: Adam Spanberger
subject: FW: last night’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
One election-watcher referred to Abigail's closing statement as "electrifying" \-- and I think that is an understatement.
| | Peter, I hope you can take a minute to read Abigail's note from earlier today. Because, as her husband, I am constantly impressed by and proud of Abigail -- **but her incredible performance at the debate last night truly blew me away.** Abigail was calm, she was confident, she was sharp, and she won the debate. She was in command of that stage from the start. She engaged in policy specifics with ease. And Rep. Dave Brat, whose only strategy seemed to be name-checking politicians he is not running against, clearly did not know what he was getting himself into. One election-watcher referred to Abigail's closing statement as "electrifying" \-- _and I think that is an understatement, Peter._ [**You can watch it here, and then chip in to support the campaign in the final stretch:**](https://act.myngp.com/el/C3kDzWAZ9cRLp3yQvlLKm44-wKE8oZrY9XIqnaxDPEQ=/kyIJJK1wQ0t-Mvucqg4rGf57RLdVswhCCrua3HtlUe0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C3kDzWAZ9cRLp3yQvlLKm44-wKE8oZrY9XIqnaxDPEQ=/kyIJJK1wQ0t-Mvucqg4rGf57RLdVswhCCrua3HtlUe0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) As you will see in the video, last night, Abigail showed our district -- and anyone else watching -- why this once-safely Republican district is now a toss-up. We have a chance to do something truly special here in VA-7. The election is in 21 days. [**Take a minute to watch her closing statement, and then make a donation today to help Abigail finish strong, if you can.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/C3kDzWAZ9cRLp3yQvlLKm44-wKE8oZrY9XIqnaxDPEQ=/kyIJJK1wQ0t-Mvucqg4rGf57RLdVswhCCrua3HtlUe0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Adam \-----forwarded message----- From: Abigail Spanberger Sent: Tue, Oct 16, 3:41 PM Subject: last night's debate Friends, Last night, I faced off with Rep. Dave Brat in our first, and likely only, debate of this campaign. It was a distinct honor to stand up on stage and share my vision for Central Virginia with voters in our community. I made the case for investing in rural broadband and offered my plans to bring down the cost of prescription drugs. I pledged to focus on consensus-building to deliver tangible results for the 7th district, and I asked for our community's trust and support in this race. Rep. Brat, perhaps unsurprisingly, insisted on misrepresenting my positions on the issues. But I stayed focused on policy, **and we kept Rep. Brat accountable for his hypocritical voting record, his refusal to compromise, and his repeated false statements about me.** **And I say we, Peter, because I would not have been on that stage, making my case to voters, without you.** This community of grassroots supporters is the backbone of our campaign to bring positive change to VA-7, and it is because of you that this once-safely Republican district is now a tied race. There are exactly three weeks left until Election Day, and I would appreciate [**your continued support**](https://act.myngp.com/el/C3kDzWAZ9cRLp3yQvlLKm44-wKE8oZrY9XIqnaxDPEQ=/kyIJJK1wQ0t-Mvucqg4rGf57RLdVswhCCrua3HtlUe0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) over the next 21 days. Already, we have received some incredible feedback on my performance in the debate, **and I am confident that, with you by my side, this moment will represent a turning point for our campaign.** It will take hard work, right up until the polls close on November 6th, but we can and will surge to a lead. [**Peter, consider making a donation of any size to help me finish this race strong.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/C3kDzWAZ9cRLp3yQvlLKm44-wKE8oZrY9XIqnaxDPEQ=/kyIJJK1wQ0t-Mvucqg4rGf57RLdVswhCCrua3HtlUe0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) You will make a difference. Thank you, \- Abigail [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C3kDzWAZ9cRLp3yQvlLKm44-wKE8oZrY9XIqnaxDPEQ=/kyIJJK1wQ0t-Mvucqg4rGf57RLdVswhCCrua3HtlUe0=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b2_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/C3kDzWAZ9cRLp3yQvlLKm44-wKE8oZrY9XIqnaxDPEQ=/rJGWYVcI5PAKxkTgZ8qxBWwbT4xrC5UR0JzOoSMuq1E=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/C3kDzWAZ9cRLp3yQvlLKm44-wKE8oZrY9XIqnaxDPEQ=/T3UA_dH6Sf_ho_Bo4dr4o_eFPFZ6JR7JiExEaXadmVU=)_
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/C3kDzWAZ9cRLp3yQvlLKm44-wKE8oZrY9XIqnaxDPEQ=/V0ddncOdZ0z4HAkDZyvgSPz7cqN9HS4jj3b5mYNs8AI=).

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: I need your help, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
My campaign recently learned that my far-right opponent, Wendy Rogers, actually outraised us during the previous reporting period. To win this race and keep AZ-01 blue, we cannot get outraised again.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e74/1a8421e1/19a9dfd69/49467d50/4189180643/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
I need your help today, friends. **Tomorrow at midnight is the final Federal Election Commission deadline before the election -- and it is imperative that we reach our ambitious goal.** Because, in addition to being the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, my campaign recently learned that my far-right opponent, Wendy Rogers, actually outraised us during the previous reporting period. _**There are exactly three weeks until Election Day, and to win this race and keep AZ-01 blue, we simply cannot get outraised again, friends.**_ **So I am counting on you to help me reach my goal tomorrow.** **[Can you make a donation of any size today, so that we can finish this race with the resources needed to win?](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. ---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I sincerely appreciate **[your continued support](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") **in this race, friends. With the far-right so determined to unseat me, we must be firing on all cylinders until the polls close on November 6th.

It will not be easy -- that much I can promise you. But if we finish this race strong, we will be declaring victory three weeks from today, and Democrats will take back the House.

**[Please make a donation today, if you can.](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Your support will truly make a difference.

Yours,

Tom

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

name: Mike Thompson
subject: this could be huge
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/u2W2EBf_ks2KXjFvR14Kl1PwhVkB3qa3zese2E-3io8=/WVRy4VLaqlWYBvgV53D5NqqMnCl1NcU6JICmgeJ2nvg=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_181016_2_2&amount=25.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D) Across the country and right here in California, shady GOP groups are spending HUGE amounts in key races in last-ditch attempts to hold onto their majority. We have a real chance at turning Congress BLUE just 3 weeks from today, [**but we can 't get complacent now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/u2W2EBf_ks2KXjFvR14Kl1PwhVkB3qa3zese2E-3io8=/sR4kdDoz3aUle7vv19XJ9vxkqAM8AQop3BKwAts9lfc=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_181016_2_2&amount=15.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)

This past weekend, we sent volunteers across the state and all the way to Nevada to get the message out about Democrats running to put an end to the reckless Trump agenda - and we're not stopping there.

body:
Here are some current bottom lines on polling that are on my mind: -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, I'm going to ask you to support every Democrat in Virginia in a moment. You can do it with just one click - and with the most House toss-ups here in recent history - I can promise that one click will go pretty far.

**Here are some current bottom lines on polling that are on my mind:**
* 1\. There is a poll that shows Trump-backed Corey Stewart within single digits of Tim Kaine, and if the Democratic base doesn't turn out that margin could shrink.

* 2\. Polls in VA-10 fluctuate constantly, but overall they show a strong possibility that Jennifer Wexton defeats Barbara Comstock and flips the district blue.

* 3\. Elaine Luria in VA-02, Leslie Cockburn in VA-05, and Abigail Spanberger in VA-07 have all been moved to firm toss-ups and any polls are within margin of error - meaning it could turn any way on Election Day, _we just don 't know._

**Can you help us move the needle in our favor? Click below to rush a donation to ALL the Democratic candidates in Virginia. Our Virginia Victory Fund finances the coordinated campaign so that all candidates have the ads, mailers, and staff they need to close the margins in these tight races. Your contribution will support Vangie Williams, Elaine Luria, Bobby Scott, Donald McEachin, Leslie Cockburn, Jennifer Lewis, Abigail Spanberger, Don Beyer, Anthony Flaccavento, Jennifer Wexton, and Gerry Connolly.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Tim Kaine and Virginia Victory Fund will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1031/3e0906/779a0efe/3e37ee40/1328065786/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-coordinated-split-2018?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20181016_2_FR_BS_coordinated-split-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20181016_2_FR_BS_coordinated-split-LDND&source=20181016_2_FR_BS_coordinated-split-LDND")

As the coordinated campaign director, it's my job to watch both the polls and the fundraising numbers very closely.

Because of this, I can tell you that your donation today goes to support every Democrat running in Virginia. We've got Democrats in every corner of the state making real progress towards flipping the House and establishing competitive districts. Even in our rural areas, Democrats are taking solid Republican districts and moving them to likely, lean and eventually toss-ups. We assess need and then make sure everyone is getting the resources that will allow them to run the best possible campaign.

**So if you 're like me and watching the polls all over Virginia both stresses you out and makes you fired up to win every possible race we can: I'm asking you to donate to Tim Kaine AND our Victory Fund that goes to all of the House candidates.**

[Can you help? Click here to make one donation that makes the ultimate impact.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1031/3e0906/779a0efe/3e37ee5a/1328065786/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-coordinated-split-2018?refcode=20181016_2_FR_BS_coordinated-split-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Can+you+help+Click+here+to+make+one+dona&utm_campaign=20181016_2_FR_BS_coordinated-split-LDND&source=20181016_2_FR_BS_coordinated-split-LDND")

name: M. Kelly
subject: this news is HUGE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | | I need your help, friends: **My campaign is up against the corporate special interests bankrolling Chris Sununu, including more than $50,000 in campaign contributions from our state's utility company, Eversource.**
---
And here's the thing: I'm refusing to take any money from corporations because special interests have been placed above hardworking New Hampshire families for too long.

That's why this news is HUGE: **A generous group of donors just offered to MATCH every donation, dollar for dollar, to help us hit our $50,000 match goal.**
**We can't afford to miss this rare opportunity, so I need grassroots donors like you to give $5 or more right now - and get your gift DOUBLED to win in New Hampshire and defeat the Trump/Sununu agenda:**

subject: checking numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Martin's been trying to reach you. Our last FEC report before the election is due after tomorrow -- and it's the first time our numbers will be compared to Gary Johnson's since a national super PAC pledged millions to support Johnson.

**_[I just checked the numbers, and we still need to raise $30,940 to reach our budget goal. I know our grassroots supporters can close that gap. Can you pitch in a few dollars to help us before our most important FEC deadline this year?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+I+just+checked+the+numbers+and+we+still+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5")_**

_Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:_

I face my final Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline before the election tomorrow.

This is the first fundraising report I'll file since a national Libertarian super PAC swooped into New Mexico to support Gary Johnson. **I think my record speaks for itself, but I cannot get drowned out by dark-money groups trying to sway the election. Read more below on what progress could be lost if I 'm defeated this year, or if you've heard enough, _[help me reach our new fundraising goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+help+me+reach+our+new+fundraising+goal+b&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

**I have been leading the conversation on cybersecurity and the threats we face from foreign hackers.** Beyond our election infrastructure, our energy grid and transportation systems are also susceptible to hacking attacks, with potentially disastrous consequences. We secured $380 million for election security earlier this year, and my amendment to establish a national cyber warfare doctrine passed the Senate last month.

**I 've also been fighting to protect investments in our rural transportation infrastructure in New Mexico.** The Senate recently passed my bipartisan amendment for an additional $50 million to help maintain the Southwest Chief Amtrak route. Trains help connect New Mexico to the rest of the country, and keeping this route is critical to the local economy and the rural communities that rely on this line.
[DONATE $29 NOW >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5") **And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am fighting to protect them.** I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area -- a sacred place to all New Mexicans -- from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives -- and that has Gary Johnson, Republicans, and super PACs worried.

**Midnight Wednesday is the last FEC reporting deadline before the election, and****afterwards****I will have to report my fundraising numbers for the final time. With early voting starting this weekend, we cannot afford to miss this goal and be shorthanded for the final weeks of the election.**

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To report our strongest FEC numbers yet, our new budget goal is to raise $40,830 before our deadline tomorrow. All this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme opponents defeats me in November. Will you contribute now and help us close our budget gap before we must publically report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5")** Thank you for standing with me,

Martin

Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40f/43d8135f/6604272c/5101be6d/124727016/VEsP/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5")**

Make sure to follow the campaign on **[Twitter](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40f/43d8135f/6604272c/5101be6c/124727016/VEsHBQ/ "https://twitter.com/teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5")** and **[Facebook.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40f/43d8135f/6604272c/5101be6f/124727016/VEsHBA/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5")**

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40f/43d8135f/6604272c/5101be6e/124727016/VEsHBw/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40f/43d8135f/6604272c/5101be91/124727016/VEsHBg/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_2_5").

Martin Heinrich for Senate
PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125

Chuck Schumer & Nancy Pelosi are spending millions of dollars in New Jersey to buy corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez another six years in Washington ― help us fight back! | | | Peter, Bob Menendez is feeling the heat. Now, Chuck, Nancy, and Democratic party bosses are coming to Menendez’s rescue. We just got word that Senate Majority PAC, Chuck Schumer’s dark money SuperPAC, is spending another $3 million on ads to attack Bob and our campaign. Nobody can hide the fact that we’re on the path to victory – not even Menendez himself. Let’s show Chuck and Nancy that our campaign is stronger than ever. We know New Jersey deserves better. name: Ryan Furlong
subject: We don't know where these ads will launch first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Steve Bannon is hitting the road for Donald Trump.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181016_em-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") **_ABC NEWS:_**
_" Group led by Steve Bannon spending $3 million on digital ads ahead of midterm election"_ **Fight back against right-wing attacks now:** **[Rush a Contribution](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181016_em-full&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")** Friend, we just got word Steve Bannon is launching an all-out attack against Democrats to save the Republican majorities -- and one of his top targets is Minnesota. **From the _ABC News_ article:**

_"[Steve Bannon] traveling to 10 states including Virginia, New York, Pennsylvania, Kansas, Michigan, Arizona, Iowa, **Minnesota** , Texas __and_ _Florida,**with a message that the president is at war with the Democrats**..."_ We don't know where his ads will launch first, but with him traveling to Minnesota you can bet we are at the top of his list. We have to be ready -- and we're counting on this team to counter his dark money attacks. **Can you rush an urgent contribution to defend Tina against the right-wing attacks Bannon is launching to save Trump and his Republican majority in the Senate? With less than 48 hours to go before our final FEC deadline every dollar will matter:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d553/c1f7015/6f85bb1a/11416ecd/1385842295/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-october_goal?refcode=rtw_20181016_em-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Team Scholten
subject: What Money Can't Buy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter, Last night we received some incredible news! The final quarterly FEC fundraising reports came out, and the results were a true reflection of the work ethic and support for the respective candidates and their campaigns. **Steve King, aided by big money from corporate PACs, raised less than $162,000.** **J.D., who refuses to accept cor****porate PAC money, raised over $661,000!**
First of all, **THANK YOU!** Your support is what’s fueling this movement and putting us in a position to win. It’s giving us the opportunity to get out the word about J.D. with advertising on TV, radio, social media, and more. **What we need more of is the one thing that money can’t buy; we need your time and energy as volunteers.**
You can contact voters face-to-face at their doors, call remotely from your home, do data entry, help promote our message on social media, or even cook meals to feed our hungry volunteers. If you have a skill, we’ll find a way to put it to use. **_[All you need to do is sign up HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2679724/16365839/-1382113071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTJhOTM3Yi1iYWQxLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05UDjOIkXHl_b2fwF0nRrvPASD-kI6MyZzHMvLCohHg=)_**[** _._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2679725/16365840/-1382113071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTJhOTM3Yi1iYWQxLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05UDjOIkXHl_b2fwF0nRrvPASD-kI6MyZzHMvLCohHg=)
Election Day is three weeks away and this race is getting tighter by the day. The volunteer support we receive between now and November 6th is going to mean the difference between winning and losing.
**You can help us show Steve King the door by knocking on a few yourself.** [**_Sign up to volunteer today,_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2679726/16365841/-1382113071?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTJhOTM3Yi1iYWQxLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05UDjOIkXHl_b2fwF0nRrvPASD-kI6MyZzHMvLCohHg=) and together, we’ll build a 4th District, an Iowa, and an America that Stands Tall for All!
Thank you,
Team Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2679727/16365842/1568348104?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTJhOTM3Yi1iYWQxLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05UDjOIkXHl_b2fwF0nRrvPASD-kI6MyZzHMvLCohHg=)
